metadata.report_title: Legal RAG System Security Improvement Plan

executive_summary.recommended_priority: Address HIGH severity items within 24-48 hours

vulnerability_analysis.title: Hardcoded JWT_SECRET Fallback
vulnerability_analysis.description: The application falls back to hardcoded secrets ('supersecret' and 'default-secret-change-in-production') when JWT_SECRET environment variable is not set. This allows attackers to forge valid JWT tokens if deployed without proper configuration.

remediation.description: Remove all fallback secrets and fail fast if JWT_SECRET is not configured

new_service_required.name: SecretValidationService

vulnerability_analysis.title: CORS Wildcard Default
vulnerability_analysis.description: CORS is configured to fall back to '*' (allow all origins) when CORS_ORIGIN is not set. This allows any website to make authenticated requests to the API, enabling CSRF attacks and data theft.

remediation.description: Implement strict CORS configuration with whitelist validation

code_changes.new_code:
import { getCorsConfig } from './config/cors.config.js';

await app.register(cors, getCorsConfig());

vulnerability_analysis.title: Missing HTTPS Enforcement and HSTS Headers
vulnerability_analysis.description: The application does not enforce HTTPS or set HTTP Strict Transport Security (HSTS) headers. This exposes users to man-in-the-middle attacks, session hijacking, and cookie theft.

server_integration.add_hook:
// Add security headers middleware
app.addHook('onRequest', securityHeadersMiddleware);

vulnerability_analysis.title: Verbose Error Messages May Leak Stack Traces
vulnerability_analysis.description: Error responses include detailed error messages and potentially stack traces that could reveal internal implementation details, file paths, and system configuration to attackers.

remediation.description: Implement centralized error handling that sanitizes error responses

vulnerability_analysis.title: Missing Data Encryption at Rest for PII
vulnerability_analysis.description: Personal Identifiable Information (PII) such as email, name, phone number, address, bar number, and payment details are stored in plaintext. This violates GDPR Article 32 and SOC2 requirements for data protection.

remediation.description: Implement application-level encryption for PII fields using AES-256-GCM

schema_changes.description: Add hash columns for searchable encrypted fields
migrations: ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN email_hash VARCHAR(64);
ALTER TABLE users ADD COLUMN name_hash VARCHAR(64);

implementation_tasks.title: Implement Right to Erasure (Data Deletion)
implementation_tasks.description: Create comprehensive data deletion service that removes all user PII across all tables

implementation_tasks.title: Implement Data Export (Portability)
implementation_tasks.description: Create service to export all user data in machine-readable format

implementation_tasks.title: Implement Consent Management
implementation_tasks.description: Track and manage user consent for data processing activities

schema_additions.prisma_code:
model UserConsent {
  id          String   @id @default(uuid())
  userId      String   @map("user_id")
  consentType String   @map("consent_type") // marketing, analytics, third_party, data_processing
  granted     Boolean
  ipAddress   String?  @map("ip_address")
  userAgent   String?  @map("user_agent")
  version     String   // Consent policy version
  grantedAt   DateTime @default(now()) @map("granted_at")
  revokedAt   DateTime? @map("revoked_at")
  
  user User @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
  
  @@index([userId])
  @@index([consentType])
  @@map("user_consents")
}

implementation_tasks.title: Implement Processing Activity Records
implementation_tasks.description: Maintain records of all data processing activities

new_service.description: Service to log and query data processing activities

implementation_tasks.title: Implement Breach Notification System
implementation_tasks.description: System to detect and notify relevant parties of data breaches within 72 hours

new_service.description: Automated breach detection and notification workflow

controls.name: Logical and Physical Access Controls
gaps: Missing MFA enforcement for admin users

remediation.task: Implement mandatory MFA for admin roles
Implement strict CORS and API gateway
Implement security headers and HTTPS enforcement

controls.name: Software Development Lifecycle
gaps: No automated security scanning in CI/CD

remediation.task: Implement data classification and PII inventory

controls.name: Data Encryption
gaps: No encryption at rest for PII

environment_variables.name: JWT_SECRET
environment_variables.description: Strong secret for JWT signing (required, no fallback)

environment_variables.name: PII_ENCRYPTION_KEY
environment_variables.description: Master key for PII field encryption

required_npm_packages.name: rate-limiter-flexible
required_npm_packages.purpose: Advanced rate limiting with Redis support

phase_2_important.focus: Address MEDIUM severity and GDPR core requirements

compliance_tests.name: GDPR Data Deletion Test
compliance_tests.description: Verify all user data is deleted on request
assertions: No user record exists after deletion
No PII remains in any table

compliance_tests.name: Encryption Test
assertions: PII fields are encrypted in database
